warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Cossack Squats
5 Tempo Banded Squats
15 Empty Bar Squats

strength.name: Back Squat
strength.description:
3x2 | *Shoulder blades to back pocket
*Ribcage to pelvis
*Screw feet out into floor | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 3 Sets
00:00 5 @ 55%
03:00 5 @ 65%
06:00 2 @ 75%
09:00 2 @ 85%
HOLD 3 Sets
12:00 2 @ 90%
15:00 2 @ 90%
18:00 2 @ 90%

strength.name: Behind The Neck Jerk
strength.description:
1x3 | *Knees out, Keep upright
*Pause in catch
*Bring front foot back first | E2MOM 10min
Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3
08:00 3

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
EMOM x
Min 1: Row for calories
Min 2: 10 HSPU
Min 3: 10 Pull Ups
Min 4: Rest
Count Calories

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address pulling imbalances and posterior chain support without competing with heavy squat/jerk CNS fatigue.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Strength: Behind The Neck Jerk, 1 by 3. Metcon: EMOM: Count Calories. For hypertrophy, focus on biceps, rear deltoids, hamstrings.
